basic_details.job_title: MGU Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 30 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) has published the Assistant Professor on Contract Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 30 Assistant Professor positions on a contract basis. Candidates up to 70 years of age for retired teachers, and holding qualifications as per UGC norms, are eligible to attend the walk-in process. Interested applicants can participate in the walk-in from the dates mentioned in the official notification, with direct links to download the PDF and details provided below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 70 years for retired teachers as on 01.01.2026.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 70 years for retired teachers as on 01.01.2026.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Assistant Professor on Contract - Computer Science (IIRBS)
Assistant Professor on Contract - Environmental Science
Assistant Professor on Contract - Computer Science (NIPST)
Assistant Professor on Contract - Data Analytics
Assistant Professor on Contract - Environmental Science (Graduate School)
Assistant Professor on Contract - Physics (Graduate School)
Assistant Professor on Contract - Politics & International Relations

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹40,000/- per month (UGC qualified), ₹33,000/- per month (non-UGC qualified)
salary_details.details: Consolidated pay of ₹40,000/- per month for UGC qualified hands. Consolidated pay of ₹33,000/- per month for non-UGC qualified hands.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Assistant Professor on Contract at MGU?
faq.answer: Mahatma Gandhi University has announced a total of 30 vacancies for the post of Assistant Professor on Contract across various disciplines.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to report directly to the venue with their documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for Assistant Professor on Contract?
faq.answer: The salary offered is ₹40,000/- per month for UGC qualified candidates and ₹33,000/- per month for non-UGC qualified candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria are as per UGC norms. Specific qualifications for each discipline should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there an age limit for the applicants?
faq.answer: Yes, for retired teachers, the maximum age limit is 70 years as on 01.01.2026. Other age limits may apply and should be verified in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to bring original documents and self-attested copies of proof of age, community, qualifications, experience, and any other relevant certificates.

faq.question: Q7. When are the interviews scheduled?
faq.answer: The interviews are scheduled on various dates in June 2026, starting from June 9, 2026, and continuing until June 26, 2026, depending on the specific post and department.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in-interview. Candidates will be assessed based on their qualifications and performance during the interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are conducted at Mahatma Gandhi University, Kottayam, Kerala. Specific venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.
